description:
Vercara's UltraDNS service produces Domain Name Server (DNS) exhaust (e.g., query, response) of over 500 billion records / day, and an average of 6 million records / second. Vercara shares their journey from an Enterprise Data Warehouse (EDW) to a cost effective, high-performance Data Lake based on Amazon S3 and Amazon Athena that positions them for scale and growth in the future.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​ cloud:
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO

#AWS #AmazonWebServices #CloudComputing #ThisIsMyArchitecture #Analytics #AmazonS3 #AmazonAthena

chapters.title: How does Vercara process their data

fulltitle: Vercara UltraDNS Analytics & Operations: Petabyte-Scale Data on Amazon S3 and Amazon Athena
